g.text: Held-out combined-stress validation on a distinct bundle

text.style: font-size: 8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Arial', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #8a9199

g.text: PSMS-v2 stays positive and feasible, EVTBO is neutral, and BO fails the held-out guard.
